flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Morgan Community College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (56.8% → 44.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Morgan Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.9k → $4.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Morgan Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.3k → $16.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Morgan Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
